description: For the woman with an modern, dynamic lifestyle, the floral aquatic Natural Vitality from adidas is the right choice. Bottled in a lavender flacon it has top notes of litchi, apple, orange and tomato aromas, mid notes of watermelon, osmanthus and lotus and base notes of sandalwood and musk.Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
